creator: direct727@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to David Chisnall from comment #5)
> The flag is -integrated-as, not -fintegrated-as.

Great. I was able to get libobjc2 to compile with this flag.

And given you are the maintainer for gnustep-base, just to let you know I then proceeded to build the gnustep-base package, which also required the -integrated-as flag to build. (And found the libiconv package is a hard dependancy). 

Bug report for gnustep-base https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=194239 (GNUstep binaries segfault) 

Thank you
